title: Huawei makes 1.4nm chip??
summary: Caleb Writes Code discusses Huawei's announcement of a Tau Scaling Law designed to compete in the global semiconductor race against the USA. The video examines the role of EUV and DUV lithography, packaging, and logic folding as key technologies driving the industry forward amid China-USA competition.
